# VV | WebApps Portal

A unified browser-based workspace for real-time MIDI processing plugins and Tone.js rompler synthesis.

## Core Entrypoints
- Host Application: [App.jsx](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/core/App.jsx)
- Audio Rompler Engine: [MasterRompler.jsx](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/core/rompler/MasterRompler.jsx)
- Application Registry: [appRegistry.js](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/config/appRegistry.js)

## Active Modules & Plugins
- [Chord Notator](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/chord-notator)
- [Pitch Class Matrix](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/pitch-class-matrix)
- [MIDI Monitor](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/monitor)
- [MIDI Dynamics](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/dynamics)
- [Note Range Filter](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/note-range-filter)

## Technical Reference
- Architecture details and recent changes: [PROJECT_STATE.md](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/PROJECT_STATE.md)
